creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
Created attachment 256254
ocaml-pcre.patch

Dear maintainer of ocaml-pcre,

Please provide feedback on this patch.
I've submitted it as part of a larger ocaml update: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D48228

Switch from USE_GITHUB to MASTER_SITES.
Update WWW.
Switch to USES+=ocaml:dune.
Build examples.

Thanks!
